heroSection.label: EST. 1924 • GLOBAL EXCELLENCE
heroSection.title: Advancing the <0>Future</0> of Medicine
heroSection.description: Our mission is to improve human health through innovative education, groundbreaking research, and compassionate clinical care. Join a global community dedicated to medical excellence.

featuredProfessors.title: Featured Professors
featuredProfessors.subtitle: Leading experts at the forefront of medical discovery.

latestResearch.title: Latest Research & Publications
latestResearch.subtitleSp: New findings published by our researchers in top-tier journals.

innovatingSection.title: Innovating Through Research
innovatingSection.description: Our state-of-the-art facilities provide the foundation for next-generation medical breakthroughs. From level-4 biocontainment labs to advanced genomic sequencing suites, we empower our faculty to push boundaries.
innovatingSection.descriptionSp: Our state-of-the-art facilities provide the foundation for breakthroughs that redefine what's possible in medicine. Join a community of thinkers, healers, and pioneers.

requestInfoSection.title: Request Information
requestInfoSection.description: Interested in our programs or partnering with our research teams? Reach out to our admissions and administration office.
requestInfoSection.address:
123 Medical Plaza, University District
Boston, MA 02115

errors.messageMax: Message must be 1000 characters or less

footer.brandDescription: Excellence in medicine, compassion in care. Dedicated to teaching the next generation of medical leaders since 1924.
